Explanation: According to an interview with Dean Dodrill, the animator and developer behind "Dust: An Elysian Tail" (a game featuring a mammal character blasting through enemies, released after his work on "Jazz Jackrabbit 2"), as of July 24, 2013, his main workstation/gaming PC had 5TB of storage. This matches the description of the person, the timeline, and the context of the question [5266].
Exact Answer: 5TB
Confidence: 100%
